meaning: n.<美>额前蓬乱的一绺头发
examples: Had a Cowlick In Its Hair... And Didn't Pull a Face When Photographed.
Fact: That cowlick is part of you, like your height and your sense of humor.
Controlling a cowlick, no matter where it is on the head, takes patience and a great haircut.
The tip of her hair is pulled into an avant garde cowlick.
